input_text: A big bear was strong. Earth contains Europe. Mary washed and dried the cup. John smokes with a probability 0.9. Sandra travelled to the hallway. The length of Emajogi is 80 kilometers. The students studied hard and passed the exam. Cities in Estonia are estonian. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. Jessica is a mouse. These links present the many viewpoints that existed. Mike is an elephant. A chocolate cake fell. Is the green car faster than the red car?
